free_text: Complete characterization of the fission fragments

University of Vigo, Spain
A cylindrical target filled with liquid hydrogen,
approx. 85 mg/cm**2, produced in a cryostat. The target
was isolated by two windows consisting of aluminized-
mylar foils with a thickness of 35 mum.

SIS18 synchrotron
.Error in the efficiency of the detectors for
fission events
.Error in correction factor of secondary
reactions
Error in correction factor from atomic charge states is
needed for an accurate identification in the mass-over-
charge ratio. This correction is negligible for nuclei
with atomic numbers below 40 and increases
exponentially up to 15% for Z=55. The uncertainty of
this correction varies from 4% to 1% for the atomic
numbers Z=55 and Z=40, respectively.
